title: On Landed: Temporarily increase the braking friction on lands to make landings more accurate, or trigger a breakfall roll.
comment: On Landed: Temporarily increase the braking friction on lands to make landings more accurate, or trigger a breakfall roll.
terms: On Landed: Temporarily increase the braking friction on lands to make landings more accurate, or trigger a breakfall roll.

title: On Jumped: Set the new In Air Rotation to the velocity rotation if speed is greater than 100.
comment: On Jumped: Set the new In Air Rotation to the velocity rotation if speed is greater than 100.
terms: On Jumped: Set the new In Air Rotation to the velocity rotation if speed is greater than 100.

title: Breakfall / Roll: Simply play a Root Motion Montage.
comment: Breakfall / Roll: Simply play a Root Motion Montage.
terms: Breakfall / Roll: Simply play a Root Motion Montage.

title: Mantle Timeline: This timeline is triggered from the MantleStart function and updates the function that lerps the character to the new location.
comment: Mantle Timeline: This timeline is triggered from the MantleStart function and updates the function that lerps the character to the new location.
terms: Mantle Timeline: This timeline is triggered from the MantleStart function and updates the function that lerps the character to the new location.

title:
IMPORTANT!!!

This blueprint contains a lot of simple logic meant to be built on or replaced by more sophisticated systems on a Per Project basis. How you manage Movement, Movement actions, Gameplay Events, and Character States should all be determined by the specific needs of your project. 

The most important thing is to make sure you are updating the correct Character Information in the interface to allow the AnimBP to function correctly.
comment:
IMPORTANT!!!

This blueprint contains a lot of simple logic meant to be built on or replaced by more sophisticated systems on a Per Project basis. How you manage Movement, Movement actions, Gameplay Events, and Character States should all be determined by the specific needs of your project. 

The most important thing is to make sure you are updating the correct Character Information in the interface to allow the AnimBP to function correctly.

title: Stance Action: Press "Stance Action" to toggle Standing / Crouching, double tap to Roll.
comment: Stance Action: Press "Stance Action" to toggle Standing / Crouching, double tap to Roll.
terms: Stance Action: Press "Stance Action" to toggle Standing / Crouching, double tap to Roll.

title: Select Rotation Mode: Switch the desired (default) rotation mode to Velocity or Looking Direction. This will be the mode the character reverts back to when un-aiming
comment: Select Rotation Mode: Switch the desired (default) rotation mode to Velocity or Looking Direction. This will be the mode the character reverts back to when un-aiming

title: Jump Action: Press "Jump Action" to end the ragdoll if ragdolling, check for a mantle if grounded or in air, stand up if crouching, or jump if standing.
comment: Jump Action: Press "Jump Action" to end the ragdoll if ragdolling, check for a mantle if grounded or in air, stand up if crouching, or jump if standing.
terms: Jump Action: Press "Jump Action" to end the ragdoll if ragdolling, check for a mantle if grounded or in air, stand up if crouching, or jump if standing.
